---
title: "10_welch_t_test_with_bh"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
# packages

library(tidyverse)
library(gprofiler2)
library(patchwork)

# WELCH T-TEST analysis 
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# INPUT

file_cellular <- "cellular_proteomics_clean_v2.csv"
file_soluble  <- "soluble_proteomics_clean_v2.csv"
file_insoluble <- "insoluble_proteomics_clean_v2.csv"

# Expected groups/timepoints (script keeps only those found)
groups <- c("D14","D21","M03","M06","M12","M18")

fdr_cutoff <- 0.05
min_reps <- 2

# Outputs
out_gene_level <- "welchBH_cellular_soluble_gene_level.csv"
out_summary <- "welchBH_cellular_soluble_summary.csv"
out_overlap <- "welchBH_cellular_soluble_overlap.csv"


# HELPERS

id_pref <- c("gene_symbol","uniprot_id","protein_groups","protein_description","mol_weight_da")

get_qcols <- function(nms) grep("Quantity\\.log2$", nms, value = TRUE)

extract_group <- function(col, groups) {
  hit <- groups[sapply(groups, function(g) {
    grepl(paste0("(^|[^A-Za-z0-9])", g, "([^A-Za-z0-9]|$)"), col, perl = TRUE)
  })]
  if (length(hit) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  hit[1]
}

run_one_dataset <- function(df, dataset_name, groups, min_reps = 2, fdr_cutoff = 0.05) {
  id_cols <- intersect(id_pref, names(df))
  if (length(id_cols) == 0) {
    df$row_id <- seq_len(nrow(df))
    id_cols <- "row_id"
  }

  qcols <- get_qcols(names(df))
  if (length(qcols) == 0) stop("No Quantity.log2 columns found in: ", dataset_name)

  colmap <- data.frame(
    column_name = qcols,
    group = vapply(qcols, extract_group, FUN.VALUE = character(1), groups = groups),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  colmap <- colmap[!is.na(colmap$group), , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(colmap) == 0) stop("No group-matched Quantity.log2 columns in: ", dataset_name)

  gs <- sort(unique(colmap$group))
  if (length(gs) < 2) stop("Need at least 2 groups in: ", dataset_name)

  pairs <- combn(gs, 2, simplify = FALSE)

  all_gene <- list()
  all_sum <- list()

  for (pr in pairs) {
    ga <- pr[1]
    gb <- pr[2]

    cols_a <- colmap$column_name[colmap$group == ga]
    cols_b <- colmap$column_name[colmap$group == gb]

    n <- nrow(df)
    pvals <- rep(NA_real_, n)
    stats <- rep(NA_real_, n)
    log2fc <- rep(NA_real_, n)
    n_a <- integer(n)
    n_b <- integer(n)

    for (i in seq_len(n)) {
      a <- as.numeric(df[i, cols_a, drop = TRUE]); a <- a[!is.na(a)]
      b <- as.numeric(df[i, cols_b, drop = TRUE]); b <- b[!is.na(b)]

      n_a[i] <- length(a)
      n_b[i] <- length(b)

      if (length(a) < min_reps || length(b) < min_reps) next

      tt <- tryCatch(
        t.test(b, a, var.equal = FALSE, alternative = "two.sided"),  # Welch
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      if (is.null(tt)) next

      pvals[i] <- tt$p.value
      stats[i] <- unname(tt$statistic)
      log2fc[i] <- mean(b) - mean(a)  # gb - ga
    }

    # BH correction PER comparison in this dataset
    p_adj <- p.adjust(pvals, method = "BH")
    is_sig <- !is.na(p_adj) & (p_adj < fdr_cutoff)

    gene_tbl <- cbind(
      df[, id_cols, drop = FALSE],
      dataset = dataset_name,
      group_a = ga,
      group_b = gb,
      comparison = paste0(gb, "_vs_", ga),
      p_value = pvals,
      p_adj = p_adj,
      statistic = stats,
      log2fc = log2fc,
      n_group_a = n_a,
      n_group_b = n_b,
      is_significant = is_sig,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    all_gene[[length(all_gene) + 1]] <- gene_tbl

    n_tested <- sum(!is.na(pvals))
    n_sig <- sum(is_sig, na.rm = TRUE)

    all_sum[[length(all_sum) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      dataset = dataset_name,
      group_a = ga,
      group_b = gb,
      comparison = paste0(gb, "_vs_", ga),
      n_cols_a = length(cols_a),
      n_cols_b = length(cols_b),
      n_rows_total = nrow(df),
      n_tested = n_tested,
      n_significant = n_sig,
      pct_significant_of_tested = ifelse(n_tested > 0, round(100 * n_sig / n_tested, 3), NA_real_),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  list(
    gene = do.call(rbind, all_gene),
    summary = do.call(rbind, all_sum)
  )
}

pick_gene_id <- function(tbl) {
  prefs <- c("gene_symbol","uniprot_id","protein_groups","row_id")
  x <- intersect(prefs, names(tbl))
  if (length(x) == 0) stop("No gene ID column found.")
  x[1]
}


# RUN ALL DATASETS

cell <- read.csv(file_cellular, check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
sol  <- read.csv(file_soluble,  check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
insol <- read.csv(file_insoluble, check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

res_cell <- run_one_dataset(cell, "cellular", groups, min_reps, fdr_cutoff)
res_sol  <- run_one_dataset(sol,  "soluble",  groups, min_reps, fdr_cutoff)
res_insol <- run_one_dataset(insol, "insoluble", groups, min_reps, fdr_cutoff)

gene_all <- rbind(res_cell$gene, res_sol$gene)
sum_all  <- rbind(res_cell$summary, res_sol$summary)


# OVERLAP: significant genes in BOTH datasets for same comparison

gene_id_col <- pick_gene_id(gene_all)

sig <- gene_all[gene_all$is_significant %in% TRUE, , drop = FALSE]
sig <- unique(sig[, c("dataset","comparison","group_a","group_b",gene_id_col), drop = FALSE])

overlap_rows <- list()
if (nrow(sig) > 0) {
  comps <- unique(sig[, c("comparison","group_a","group_b"), drop = FALSE])

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(comps))) {
    cmp <- comps$comparison[i]
    ga <- comps$group_a[i]
    gb <- comps$group_b[i]

    sub <- sig[sig$comparison == cmp & sig$group_a == ga & sig$group_b == gb, , drop = FALSE]

    g_cell <- unique(sub[sub$dataset == "cellular", gene_id_col, drop = TRUE])
    g_sol  <- unique(sub[sub$dataset == "soluble",  gene_id_col, drop = TRUE])
    g_insol <- unique(sub[sub$dataset == "insoluble", gene_id_col, drop = TRUE])

    if (length(g_cell) == 0 && length(g_sol) == 0) next

    ov_cell_sol   <- intersect(g_cell, g_sol)
    ov_cell_insol <- intersect(g_cell, g_insol)
    ov_sol_insol  <- intersect(g_sol,  g_insol)
    ov_all_three  <- Reduce(intersect, list(g_cell, g_sol, g_insol))

    overlap_rows[[length(overlap_rows) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      comparison          = cmp,
      group_a             = ga,
      group_b             = gb,
      n_sig_cellular      = length(g_cell),
      n_sig_soluble       = length(g_sol),
      n_sig_insoluble     = length(g_insol),
      n_overlap_cell_sol  = length(ov_cell_sol),
      n_overlap_cell_insol = length(ov_cell_insol),
      n_overlap_sol_insol = length(ov_sol_insol),
      n_overlap_all_three = length(ov_all_three),
      overlap_cell_sol    = paste(ov_cell_sol,   collapse = ";"),
      overlap_cell_insol  = paste(ov_cell_insol, collapse = ";"),
      overlap_sol_insol   = paste(ov_sol_insol,  collapse = ";"),
      overlap_all_three   = paste(ov_all_three,  collapse = ";"),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
}
if (length(overlap_rows) > 0) {
  overlap_tbl <- do.call(rbind, overlap_rows)
} else {
  overlap_tbl <- data.frame(
    comparison           = character(0),
    group_a              = character(0),
    group_b              = character(0),
    n_sig_cellular       = integer(0),
    n_sig_soluble        = integer(0),
    n_sig_insoluble      = integer(0),
    n_overlap_cell_sol   = integer(0),
    n_overlap_cell_insol = integer(0),
    n_overlap_sol_insol  = integer(0),
    n_overlap_all_three  = integer(0),
    overlap_cell_sol     = character(0),
    overlap_cell_insol   = character(0),
    overlap_sol_insol    = character(0),
    overlap_all_three    = character(0),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}


# outputs
write.csv(gene_all, out_gene_level, row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(sum_all, out_summary, row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(overlap_tbl, out_overlap, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nDone. Wrote:\n")
cat("-", out_gene_level, "\n")
cat("-", out_summary, "\n")
cat("-", out_overlap, "\n")

cat("\nSummary preview:\n")
print(sum_all)

# M03->M18 ANALYSIS

# All groups — M03 will be used as the fixed reference
groups    <- c("D14", "D21", "M03", "M06", "M12", "M18")
ref_group <- "M03"

fdr_cutoff <- 0.05
min_reps   <- 2
top_n      <- 20

# Outputs
out_gene_level        <- "welchBH_m03ref_gene_level.csv"
out_summary           <- "welchBH_m03ref_summary.csv"
out_unique_cellular   <- "welchBH_m03ref_unique_cellular.csv"
out_unique_soluble    <- "welchBH_m03ref_unique_soluble.csv"
out_unique_insoluble  <- "welchBH_m03ref_unique_insoluble.csv"
out_top_sig           <- "welchBH_m03ref_top_significant.csv"

id_pref <- c("gene_symbol", "uniprot_id", "protein_groups",
             "protein_description", "mol_weight_da")

get_qcols <- function(nms) grep("Quantity\\.log2$", nms, value = TRUE)

extract_group <- function(col, groups) {
  hit <- groups[sapply(groups, function(g) {
    grepl(paste0("(^|[^A-Za-z0-9])", g, "([^A-Za-z0-9]|$)"), col, perl = TRUE)
  })]
  if (length(hit) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  hit[1]
}


# MAIN ANALYSIS FUNCTION

run_m03_reference <- function(df, dataset_name, groups, ref_group,
                               min_reps = 2, fdr_cutoff = 0.05) {
  id_cols <- intersect(id_pref, names(df))
  if (length(id_cols) == 0) {
    df$row_id <- seq_len(nrow(df))
    id_cols   <- "row_id"
  }

  qcols <- get_qcols(names(df))
  if (length(qcols) == 0) stop("No Quantity.log2 columns found in: ", dataset_name)

  colmap <- data.frame(
    column_name = qcols,
    group       = vapply(qcols, extract_group,
                         FUN.VALUE = character(1), groups = groups),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  colmap <- colmap[!is.na(colmap$group), , drop = FALSE]

  gs <- sort(unique(colmap$group))
  if (!(ref_group %in% gs)) stop(ref_group, " not found in: ", dataset_name)

  other_groups <- setdiff(gs, ref_group)
  if (length(other_groups) == 0) stop("No non-reference groups in: ", dataset_name)

  cols_ref <- colmap$column_name[colmap$group == ref_group]

  all_gene <- list()
  all_sum  <- list()

  for (gb in other_groups) {
    cols_b <- colmap$column_name[colmap$group == gb]

    n      <- nrow(df)
    pvals  <- rep(NA_real_, n)
    stats  <- rep(NA_real_, n)
    log2fc <- rep(NA_real_, n)
    n_ref  <- integer(n)
    n_b    <- integer(n)

    for (i in seq_len(n)) {
      a <- as.numeric(df[i, cols_ref, drop = TRUE]); a <- a[!is.na(a)]
      b <- as.numeric(df[i, cols_b,   drop = TRUE]); b <- b[!is.na(b)]

      n_ref[i] <- length(a)
      n_b[i]   <- length(b)

      if (length(a) < min_reps || length(b) < min_reps) next

      tt <- tryCatch(
        t.test(b, a, var.equal = FALSE, alternative = "two.sided"),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      if (is.null(tt)) next

      pvals[i]  <- tt$p.value
      stats[i]  <- unname(tt$statistic)
      log2fc[i] <- mean(b) - mean(a)   # test_group - M03
    }

    p_adj  <- p.adjust(pvals, method = "BH")
    is_sig <- !is.na(p_adj) & (p_adj < fdr_cutoff)

    gene_tbl <- cbind(
      df[, id_cols, drop = FALSE],
      dataset    = dataset_name,
      group_ref  = ref_group,
      group_test = gb,
      comparison = paste0(gb, "_vs_", ref_group),
      p_value    = pvals,
      p_adj      = p_adj,
      statistic  = stats,
      log2fc     = log2fc,
      n_ref      = n_ref,
      n_test     = n_b,
      is_significant = is_sig,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    all_gene[[length(all_gene) + 1]] <- gene_tbl

    n_tested <- sum(!is.na(pvals))
    n_sig    <- sum(is_sig, na.rm = TRUE)

    all_sum[[length(all_sum) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      dataset    = dataset_name,
      group_ref  = ref_group,
      group_test = gb,
      comparison = paste0(gb, "_vs_", ref_group),
      n_cols_ref  = length(cols_ref),
      n_cols_test = length(cols_b),
      n_rows_total  = nrow(df),
      n_tested      = n_tested,
      n_significant = n_sig,
      pct_significant_of_tested = ifelse(
        n_tested > 0, round(100 * n_sig / n_tested, 3), NA_real_),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  list(
    gene    = do.call(rbind, all_gene),
    summary = do.call(rbind, all_sum)
  )
}

pick_gene_id <- function(tbl) {
  prefs <- c("gene_symbol", "uniprot_id", "protein_groups", "row_id")
  x <- intersect(prefs, names(tbl))
  if (length(x) == 0) stop("No gene ID column found.")
  x[1]
}


# RUN ALL THREE DATASETS

cell  <- read.csv(file_cellular,  check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
sol   <- read.csv(file_soluble,   check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
insol <- read.csv(file_insoluble, check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

res_cell  <- run_m03_reference(cell,  "cellular",   groups, ref_group, min_reps, fdr_cutoff)
res_sol   <- run_m03_reference(sol,   "soluble",    groups, ref_group, min_reps, fdr_cutoff)
res_insol <- run_m03_reference(insol, "insoluble",  groups, ref_group, min_reps, fdr_cutoff)

gene_all <- rbind(res_cell$gene, res_sol$gene, res_insol$gene)
sum_all  <- rbind(res_cell$summary, res_sol$summary, res_insol$summary)


# NON-OVERLAPPING PROTEINS
# Significant in one dataset but not the others, per comparison

gene_id_col <- pick_gene_id(gene_all)

sig <- gene_all[gene_all$is_significant %in% TRUE, , drop = FALSE]

unique_cellular_rows  <- list()
unique_soluble_rows   <- list()
unique_insoluble_rows <- list()

datasets <- c("cellular", "soluble", "insoluble")
comps    <- unique(sig$comparison)

for (cmp in comps) {
  g <- lapply(datasets, function(ds) {
    unique(sig[sig$comparison == cmp & sig$dataset == ds, gene_id_col, drop = TRUE])
  })
  names(g) <- datasets

  all_others <- function(ds) unique(unlist(g[setdiff(datasets, ds)]))

  # Unique to cellular
  only_cell <- g$cellular[!(g$cellular %in% all_others("cellular"))]
  if (length(only_cell) > 0) {
    rows <- sig[sig$comparison == cmp & sig$dataset == "cellular" &
                  sig[[gene_id_col]] %in% only_cell, , drop = FALSE]
    unique_cellular_rows[[length(unique_cellular_rows) + 1]] <- rows
  }

  # Unique to soluble
  only_sol <- g$soluble[!(g$soluble %in% all_others("soluble"))]
  if (length(only_sol) > 0) {
    rows <- sig[sig$comparison == cmp & sig$dataset == "soluble" &
                  sig[[gene_id_col]] %in% only_sol, , drop = FALSE]
    unique_soluble_rows[[length(unique_soluble_rows) + 1]] <- rows
  }

  # Unique to insoluble
  only_insol <- g$insoluble[!(g$insoluble %in% all_others("insoluble"))]
  if (length(only_insol) > 0) {
    rows <- sig[sig$comparison == cmp & sig$dataset == "insoluble" &
                  sig[[gene_id_col]] %in% only_insol, , drop = FALSE]
    unique_insoluble_rows[[length(unique_insoluble_rows) + 1]] <- rows
  }
}

unique_cellular_tbl  <- if (length(unique_cellular_rows)  > 0) do.call(rbind, unique_cellular_rows)  else data.frame()
unique_soluble_tbl   <- if (length(unique_soluble_rows)   > 0) do.call(rbind, unique_soluble_rows)   else data.frame()
unique_insoluble_tbl <- if (length(unique_insoluble_rows) > 0) do.call(rbind, unique_insoluble_rows) else data.frame()

if (nrow(unique_cellular_tbl)  > 0) unique_cellular_tbl  <- unique_cellular_tbl[order(unique_cellular_tbl$p_adj), ]
if (nrow(unique_soluble_tbl)   > 0) unique_soluble_tbl   <- unique_soluble_tbl[order(unique_soluble_tbl$p_adj), ]
if (nrow(unique_insoluble_tbl) > 0) unique_insoluble_tbl <- unique_insoluble_tbl[order(unique_insoluble_tbl$p_adj), ]


# TOP SIGNIFICANT PROTEINS
# Top N most significant (lowest p_adj) per comparison per dataset

top_sig_rows <- list()

for (ds in datasets) {
  sub_ds <- sig[sig$dataset == ds, , drop = FALSE]
  for (cmp in unique(sub_ds$comparison)) {
    sub_cmp <- sub_ds[sub_ds$comparison == cmp, , drop = FALSE]
    sub_cmp <- sub_cmp[order(sub_cmp$p_adj), ]
    top     <- head(sub_cmp, top_n)
    top$rank_within_comparison <- seq_len(nrow(top))
    top_sig_rows[[length(top_sig_rows) + 1]] <- top
  }
}

top_sig_tbl <- if (length(top_sig_rows) > 0) do.call(rbind, top_sig_rows) else data.frame()

# OUTPUTS

write.csv(gene_all,            out_gene_level,       row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(sum_all,             out_summary,           row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(unique_cellular_tbl,  out_unique_cellular,  row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(unique_soluble_tbl,   out_unique_soluble,   row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(unique_insoluble_tbl, out_unique_insoluble, row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(top_sig_tbl,          out_top_sig,          row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nDone. Wrote:\n")
cat("-", out_gene_level,       "\n")
cat("-", out_summary,           "\n")
cat("-", out_unique_cellular,  "\n")
cat("-", out_unique_soluble,   "\n")
cat("-", out_unique_insoluble, "\n")
cat("-", out_top_sig,           "\n")

cat("\n--- Summary (all comparisons vs M03) ---\n")
print(sum_all)

cat("\n--- Unique to CELLULAR (not in soluble or insoluble) ---\n")
cat("Total:", nrow(unique_cellular_tbl), "entries\n")

cat("\n--- Unique to SOLUBLE (not in cellular or insoluble) ---\n")
cat("Total:", nrow(unique_soluble_tbl), "entries\n")

cat("\n--- Unique to INSOLUBLE (not in cellular or soluble) ---\n")
cat("Total:", nrow(unique_insoluble_tbl), "entries\n")

cat("\n--- Top", top_n, "most significant per comparison ---\n")
cat("Total rows:", nrow(top_sig_tbl), "\n")
```




```{r}

# TRAJECTORY ANALYSIS AND ENRICHMENT ANALYSIS 
library(tidyverse)
library(gprofiler2)


# Load Welch t-test results and original proteomics data

welch_cellular  <- read.csv("cellular_welch_results.csv")
welch_soluble   <- read.csv("soluble_welch_results.csv")
welch_insoluble <- read.csv("insoluble_welch_results.csv")

cellular  <- read.csv("cellular_proteomics_clean_v2.csv")
soluble   <- read.csv("soluble_proteomics_clean_v2.csv")
insoluble <- read.csv("insoluble_proteomics_clean_v2.csv")

timepoint_cols <- c("mean_log2_D14", "mean_log2_D21", "mean_log2_M03",
                     "mean_log2_M06", "mean_log2_M12", "mean_log2_M18")


# 1. Rebuild trajectory clusters for every pairwise comparison, per


build_comparison_trajectories <- function(welch_df, proteomics_df, comparison_name,
                                            fraction_name, seed = 42) {

  sig_genes <- welch_df %>%
    filter(comparison == comparison_name, is_significant == TRUE) %>%
    pull(gene_symbol)

  traj <- proteomics_df %>%
    filter(gene_symbol %in% sig_genes, !is.na(gene_symbol)) %>%
    distinct(gene_symbol, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    select(gene_symbol, all_of(timepoint_cols)) %>%
    filter(complete.cases(.))

  if (nrow(traj) < 10) {
    cat(fraction_name, "-", comparison_name, ": too few complete-trajectory genes (",
        nrow(traj), "), skipping\n")
    return(NULL)
  }

  mat <- traj %>% select(-gene_symbol) %>% as.matrix()
  rownames(mat) <- traj$gene_symbol
  mat_z <- t(scale(t(mat)))
  mat_z <- mat_z[complete.cases(mat_z), ]

  set.seed(seed)
  km <- kmeans(mat_z, centers = 2, nstart = 25)

  as.data.frame(mat_z) %>%
    rownames_to_column("gene_symbol") %>%
    mutate(cluster = factor(km$cluster),
           comparison = comparison_name,
           fraction = fraction_name) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(timepoint_cols),
                 names_to = "Timepoint", values_to = "z_score") %>%
    mutate(Timepoint = gsub("mean_log2_", "", Timepoint),
           Timepoint = factor(Timepoint, levels = c("D14","D21","M03","M06","M12","M18")),
           Timepoint_numeric = as.numeric(Timepoint))
}

comparisons <- unique(welch_cellular$comparison)

all_trajectories <- bind_rows(
  map_dfr(comparisons, ~build_comparison_trajectories(welch_cellular, cellular, .x, "Cellular")),
  map_dfr(comparisons, ~build_comparison_trajectories(welch_soluble, soluble, .x, "Soluble")),
  map_dfr(comparisons, ~build_comparison_trajectories(welch_insoluble, insoluble, .x, "Insoluble"))
)


# 2. Background per fraction = all genes with a complete trajectory

background_by_fraction <- all_trajectories %>%
  distinct(fraction, gene_symbol) %>%
  group_by(fraction) %>%
  summarise(background = list(unique(gene_symbol)), .groups = "drop")

background_list <- setNames(background_by_fraction$background, background_by_fraction$fraction)


# 3. Reusable function: GO:BP enrichment per fraction/comparison/cluster

run_pairwise_cluster_enrichment <- function(fraction_name, comparison_name,
                                              cluster_id, data, background_list,
                                              organism = "mmusculus") {

  genes <- data %>%
    filter(fraction == fraction_name,
           comparison == comparison_name,
           cluster == cluster_id) %>%
    distinct(gene_symbol) %>%
    pull(gene_symbol)

  if (length(genes) < 5) return(NULL)

  background <- background_list[[fraction_name]]

  res <- gost(
    query = genes,
    organism = organism,
    correction_method = "fdr",
    sources = "GO:BP",
    custom_bg = background,
    evcodes = TRUE
  )

  if (is.null(res)) return(NULL)

  res$result %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    filter(p_value < 0.05) %>%
    mutate(
      fraction = fraction_name,
      comparison = comparison_name,
      cluster = cluster_id,
      n_genes_tested = length(genes)
    ) %>%
    select(fraction, comparison, cluster, n_genes_tested,
           term_name, term_id, p_value, term_size, intersection_size, intersection)
}


# 4. Run across every fraction x comparison x cluster combination

combinations <- all_trajectories %>%
  distinct(fraction, comparison, cluster)

pairwise_go_results <- pmap_dfr(
  combinations,
  ~run_pairwise_cluster_enrichment(..1, ..2, ..3, all_trajectories, background_list)
)

cat("Total significant GO:BP terms found:", nrow(pairwise_go_results), "\n")

# 5. Save results

flatten_list_cols <- function(df) {
  df %>% mutate(across(where(is.list), ~map_chr(.x, ~paste(unlist(.x), collapse = ";"))))
}

write.csv(flatten_list_cols(pairwise_go_results),
          "pairwise_trajectory_go_enrichment.csv", row.names = FALSE)

top_terms_summary <- pairwise_go_results %>%
  group_by(fraction, comparison, cluster) %>%
  slice_min(order_by = p_value, n = 3, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(fraction, comparison, cluster, term_name, p_value, intersection_size)

print(top_terms_summary, n = 50)
write.csv(top_terms_summary, "pairwise_trajectory_go_top_terms.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Compute per-gene temporal change magnitude from the RAW (non
#    z-scored) proteomics data, per fraction — magnitude is lost once
#    data is z-scored, so this must come from the original files

timepoint_cols <- c("mean_log2_D14", "mean_log2_D21", "mean_log2_M03",
                     "mean_log2_M06", "mean_log2_M12", "mean_log2_M18")

compute_change_magnitude <- function(proteomics_df) {
  proteomics_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(gene_symbol)) %>%
    distinct(gene_symbol, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    select(gene_symbol, all_of(timepoint_cols)) %>%
    filter(complete.cases(.)) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(range_change = max(c_across(all_of(timepoint_cols))) - min(c_across(all_of(timepoint_cols)))) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    select(gene_symbol, range_change)
}

magnitude_cellular  <- compute_change_magnitude(cellular)
magnitude_soluble   <- compute_change_magnitude(soluble)
magnitude_insoluble <- compute_change_magnitude(insoluble)

magnitude_by_fraction <- bind_rows(
  magnitude_cellular  %>% mutate(fraction = "Cellular"),
  magnitude_soluble   %>% mutate(fraction = "Soluble"),
  magnitude_insoluble %>% mutate(fraction = "Insoluble")
)


# 1. Re-score pairwise_go_results by mean magnitude of intersecting
#    genes, instead of ranking by p-value

pairwise_go_magnitude <- pairwise_go_results %>%
  mutate(intersection_genes = str_split(intersection, ",")) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    mean_magnitude = mean(
      magnitude_by_fraction$range_change[
        magnitude_by_fraction$gene_symbol %in% intersection_genes &
        magnitude_by_fraction$fraction == fraction
      ],
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(mean_magnitude))


# 2. Bespoke dissertation theme

dissertation_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 9, base_family = "Carlito") +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(family = "Liberation Serif", face = "bold", size = 15, hjust = 0.5, colour = "black"),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey30"),
    strip.text       = element_text(family = "Liberation Serif", face = "bold", size = 8, colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.4),
    panel.border     = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = "grey70", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9, colour = "black"),
    axis.text        = element_text(size = 6.5, colour = "black"),
    legend.position  = "bottom"
  )

cluster_colours <- c("1" = "#0072B2", "2" = "#E69F00")


# 3. Prep top 3 terms per comparison/cluster, ranked by MAGNITUDE

prep_fraction_plot_data <- function(fraction_name, results) {
  results %>%
    filter(fraction == fraction_name) %>%
    group_by(comparison, cluster) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = mean_magnitude, n = 3, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      term_label = str_wrap(term_name, width = 28),
      cluster = factor(cluster)
    ) %>%
    arrange(comparison, cluster, mean_magnitude) %>%
    group_by(comparison) %>%
    mutate(term_label = fct_inorder(term_label)) %>%
    ungroup()
}

make_fraction_barplot <- function(fraction_name, results) {
  plot_data <- prep_fraction_plot_data(fraction_name, results)

  if (nrow(plot_data) == 0) {
    cat(fraction_name, ": no terms to plot\n")
    return(NULL)
  }

  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = term_label, y = mean_magnitude, fill = cluster)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    coord_flip() +
    facet_wrap(~comparison, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colours, name = "Cluster") +
    labs(
      title = paste0(fraction_name, ": pairwise trajectory GO:BP terms by change magnitude"),
      subtitle = "Top 3 terms per comparison/cluster, ranked by mean |log2 range| of driver genes (p < 0.05)",
      x = NULL, y = "Mean temporal change (log2 range)"
    ) +
    dissertation_theme
}


# 4. Build and export

p_cellular_go  <- make_fraction_barplot("Cellular",  pairwise_go_magnitude)
p_soluble_go   <- make_fraction_barplot("Soluble",   pairwise_go_magnitude)
p_insoluble_go <- make_fraction_barplot("Insoluble", pairwise_go_magnitude)

p_cellular_go
p_soluble_go
p_insoluble_go

ggsave("pairwise_trajectory_go_magnitude_cellular.pdf", p_cellular_go,
       width = 16, height = 20, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("pairwise_trajectory_go_magnitude_soluble.pdf", p_soluble_go,
       width = 16, height = 20, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("pairwise_trajectory_go_magnitude_insoluble.pdf", p_insoluble_go,
       width = 16, height = 20, device = cairo_pdf)

```


```{r}
# fixing up some figures

library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)

dissertation_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 8, base_family = "Carlito") +
  theme(
    plot.title       = element_text(family = "Liberation Serif", face = "bold", size = 15, hjust = 0.5, colour = "black"),
    plot.subtitle    = element_text(size = 9.5, hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey30"),
    strip.text       = element_text(family = "Liberation Serif", face = "bold", size = 7.5, colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.4),
    panel.border     = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = "grey70", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 8.5, colour = "black"),
    axis.text        = element_text(size = 10, colour = "black"),
    legend.position  = "bottom"
  )

cluster_colours <- c("1" = "#0072B2", "2" = "#E69F00")


# 1. TRAJECTORY panel — one per fraction, faceted by comparison + cluster

make_fraction_trajectory_plot <- function(fraction_name, traj_data) {
  df <- traj_data %>% filter(fraction == fraction_name)

  ggplot(df, aes(x = Timepoint_numeric, y = z_score)) +
    geom_line(aes(group = gene_symbol), alpha = 0.06, colour = "grey40") +
    geom_smooth(aes(group = cluster, colour = cluster), method = "loess", se = FALSE,
                linewidth = 0.9) +
    facet_wrap(~ comparison + cluster, ncol = 6, labeller = label_wrap_gen(18)) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = cluster_colours, name = "Cluster") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:6, labels = c("D14","D21","M03","M06","M12","M18")) +
    labs(title = paste0(fraction_name, ": trajectories"), x = "Timepoint", y = "Scaled expression") +
    dissertation_theme +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 5.5))
}


# 2. BARPLOT panel — one per fraction, faceted by comparison,
#    ranked by change magnitude (from previous step)

prep_fraction_plot_data <- function(fraction_name, results) {
  results %>%
    filter(fraction == fraction_name) %>%
    group_by(comparison, cluster) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = mean_magnitude, n = 3, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      term_label = str_wrap(term_name, width = 26),
      cluster = factor(cluster)
    ) %>%
    arrange(comparison, cluster, mean_magnitude) %>%
    group_by(comparison) %>%
    mutate(term_label = fct_inorder(term_label)) %>%
    ungroup()
}

make_fraction_go_barplot <- function(fraction_name, results) {
  plot_data <- prep_fraction_plot_data(fraction_name, results)

  ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = term_label, y = mean_magnitude, fill = cluster)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    coord_flip() +
    facet_wrap(~comparison, scales = "free_y", ncol = 6) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colours, name = "Cluster") +
    labs(title = paste0(fraction_name, ": GO:BP terms by change magnitude"),
         x = NULL, y = "Mean temporal change (log2 range)") +
    dissertation_theme

}


# 3. Build combined trajectory + barplot figure, ONE per fraction
#    (trajectory on top, enrichment bars below)

build_combined_fraction_figure <- function(fraction_name, traj_data, go_data) {
  p_traj <- make_fraction_trajectory_plot(fraction_name, traj_data)
  p_bars <- make_fraction_go_barplot(fraction_name, go_data)

  combined <- p_traj / p_bars +
    plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.4)) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = paste0(fraction_name, " fraction: pairwise trajectory clusters and GO:BP enrichment"),
      subtitle = "Top: loess-smoothed trajectory per comparison/cluster.  Bottom: top 3 GO:BP terms ranked by change magnitude",
      tag_levels = "A"
    ) &
    theme(
      plot.tag = element_text(family = "Liberation Serif", face = "bold", size = 13, colour = "black"),
      plot.title = element_text(family = "Liberation Serif", face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5, colour = "black"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5, colour = "grey30")
    )

  combined
}

# 4. Build and export, one combined figure per fraction

final_cellular_combined  <- build_combined_fraction_figure("Cellular",  all_trajectories, pairwise_go_magnitude)
final_soluble_combined   <- build_combined_fraction_figure("Soluble",   all_trajectories, pairwise_go_magnitude)
final_insoluble_combined <- build_combined_fraction_figure("Insoluble", all_trajectories, pairwise_go_magnitude)

final_cellular_combined
final_soluble_combined
final_insoluble_combined

ggsave("pairwise_combined_cellular.pdf", final_cellular_combined,
       width = 24, height = 24, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("pairwise_combined_soluble.pdf", final_soluble_combined,
       width = 24, height = 24, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("pairwise_combined_insoluble.pdf", final_insoluble_combined,
       width = 24, height = 24, device = cairo_pdf)

ggsave("pairwise_combined_cellular.png", final_cellular_combined,
       width = 24, height = 24, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
ggsave("pairwise_combined_soluble.png", final_soluble_combined,
       width = 24, height = 24, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
ggsave("pairwise_combined_insoluble.png", final_insoluble_combined,
       width = 24, height = 24, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
```
